requires: SUPABASE_KEY (and optionally mirror SERVICE_ROLE into KEY for sync modules)
MODE_A_remote_sync_preferred.live_first_20: Unset LIVE_FIRST_20_LOCAL_FIRST_OK or false when using remote

MODE_B_local_first_explicit.use_when: No Supabase project or deliberate local-only preflight acknowledgment
MODE_B_local_first_explicit.not_preferred_when: Supabase is available and remote inspection is required

alignment_note: Preflight uses MODE A or B. Databank Python sync (`supabase_trade_sync`) only reads SUPABASE_URL + SUPABASE_KEY — align envs accordingly.
